description: Document-style evidence card with header, tags, title, body text, metadata row, and alert bar

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Document header label, e.g. 'EXHIBIT A — FORENSIC REPORT'
fields.LABEL_1: Main evidence headline, e.g. 'Backdoor Installed on 47 Servers'
fields.LABEL_3: Metadata item 2, e.g. 'SOURCE: FBI Forensics Division'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: 2-3 sentence description of the evidence item
fields.ALERT_TEXT: Bottom alert bar text, e.g. 'CAUTION: Contents subject to ongoing investigation'
